title: rosa canina var. lejeunei
intro: Rosa canina var. lejeunei is a specific variety of the Rosa canina, also known as the wild rose or dog rose, a flowering shrub native to Europe. The medicinal properties of Rosa canina var. lejeunei lie in its high content of antioxidants, vitamins, and plant compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial agent, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Rosa canina var. lejeunei is commonly prepared as herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
